hero.subtitle: More listings, statistics, featured placement, and a Pro badge.

cta.notImplemented: Checkout isn't available yet — we'll email you when it's ready.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: You're charged immediately when you choose a paid plan, then automatically on the same date every billing cycle (monthly or annually) until you cancel.
faq.a2: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your billing settings; your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period.
faq.q3: What happens to my listings after a downgrade?
faq.a3: Listings above your new plan's limit are archived, not deleted — you can restore them if you upgrade again.
faq.q4: Which currencies can I pay with?
faq.a4: Prices are shown in the currency selected in the header (AMD, USD, EUR, RUB).
faq.a5: We offer a full refund within 14 days of your first payment if you're not satisfied — contact support.

about.metaDescription: Learn about RE Platform's mission to make buying, selling and renting property in Armenia simple, transparent and trustworthy.
about.heroTagline: We're building the most trusted way to buy, sell and rent property in Armenia.
storyParagraphs: RE Platform started in 2024 with a simple observation: finding a trustworthy listing, a reliable agent, or a fair price in Armenia's real estate market took far too much guesswork. Buyers scrolled through outdated classifieds, sellers struggled to reach real demand, and everyone relied on word of mouth to avoid scams.

We set out to build a single, modern marketplace where every listing is verifiable, every price is transparent, and every conversation happens in one place — whether you're buying your first apartment in Yerevan, renting a home in Gyumri, or listing a plot of land in Lori.

Today, RE Platform connects thousands of buyers, sellers, renters and agents across Armenia. We're still a small team, but our mission hasn't changed: make property transactions in Armenia simple, transparent and trustworthy — in Armenian, Russian and English.

values.title: Transparency
values.body: Clear pricing, verified listings and honest information — no hidden fees, no bait-and-switch.

values.title: Trust & safety
values.body: Identity checks for agents, moderated listings, and a support team that actually responds.

values.title: Local expertise
values.body: Built for Armenia's market — local currencies, neighborhoods, and legal context baked in.

values.title: Accessibility
values.body: Trilingual by design (Armenian, Russian, English) so everyone can search and list with confidence.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the RE Platform team — general questions, support, partnerships or complaints. We usually reply within one business day.
contact.heroSubtitle: Have a question? Fill out the form and we'll get back to you soon.

form.success: Thank you, we'll get back to you soon.
form.rateLimited: Too many requests, try again a little later.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about buying, selling, renting and using RE Platform.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.noResultsBody: Try a different search term, or contact us directly.

items.question: What is RE Platform?
items.answer: RE Platform is a marketplace to search, list, buy, sell and rent residential and commercial property across Armenia. Listings, agent profiles and messaging are all in one place, in Armenian, Russian and English.

items.question: Is using RE Platform free?
items.answer: Browsing, searching and contacting sellers is always free. Posting a basic listing is free too — optional Pro features (extra photos, boosted placement, analytics) are available on paid plans.

items.question: How do I contact a seller or agent?
items.answer: Open any listing and use the “Send a message” button to start a conversation, or “Show phone” to call directly. All conversations are saved in your Messages inbox.

items.question: Can I save a search and get notified of new listings?
items.answer: Yes. Set your filters on the search page, then click “Save search”. We'll notify you when a new listing matches your criteria.

items.question: How do I list a property?
items.answer: Click “Post a property” in the header and follow the step-by-step wizard: property type, location, details, photos, and price. Your listing goes live after a quick review.

items.question: How do I change the price of my listing?
items.answer: Open your listing from the dashboard, click “Edit”, update the price and save. The change is reflected immediately.

items.question: Is posting a listing free?
items.answer: Yes, posting a standard listing is free. Pro subscribers get additional photos, top placement in search results, and performance analytics.

items.question: How do I search for rentals instead of sales?
items.answer: Use the “Rent” toggle at the top of the search page, or start from the “Rent” menu in the header — results update to show rental listings only.

items.question: Are there special tools for landlords?
items.answer: Yes — our Landlord tools help you track applicants, manage multiple units and collect rent reminders in one dashboard.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: Go to the sign-in page and click “Forgot password”. We'll email you a secure link to set a new password.

items.question: How is my account verified?
items.answer: We verify accounts by email and, for agents, by phone and agency documentation. Verified badges help buyers trust listings faster.

items.question: Can I delete my account and data?
items.answer: Yes. Open Settings → Privacy and choose “Delete account”. This permanently removes your profile, listings and messages within 30 days.

items.question: What do I get with a Pro subscription?
items.answer: Pro plans unlock unlimited active listings, boosted placement, advanced analytics and priority support.

items.question: What payment methods are supported?
items.answer: We accept major debit and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, ArCa) and local bank transfers for annual Pro plans.

items.question: Can I get an invoice or receipt for my payment?
items.answer: Yes — invoices are generated automatically after each payment and are available from your billing settings.

terms.metaDescription: The terms and conditions governing your use of RE Platform — accounts, listings, prohibited content and liability.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of RE Platform. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of terms
body: By creating an account, browsing listings, or using any part of RE Platform (the “Service”), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
We may update these Terms from time to time; material changes will be announced on this page with an updated “Last updated” date.

sections.heading: 2. Your account
body: You must provide accurate information when registering and keep your credentials confidential. You are responsible for all activity under your account.
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or applicable law.

sections.heading: 3. User obligations
body: You agree to provide truthful information about any property you list, respond to inquiries in good faith, and comply with all applicable Armenian laws and regulations regarding property transactions.

sections.heading: 4. Prohibited content
body: You may not post listings that are fraudulent, misleading, discriminatory, or that advertise property you do not have the right to sell or rent. We reserve the right to remove any listing or content that violates this policy without notice.

sections.heading: 5. Intellectual property
body: The RE Platform name, logo, design and software are our property or licensed to us. Content you upload (photos, descriptions) remains yours, but you grant us a license to display it on the Service for the purpose of operating the marketplace.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of liability
body: The Service is provided “as is”. To the maximum extent permitted by law, RE Platform is not liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.

sections.heading: 7. Marketplace disclaimer
body: RE Platform is a listings and communication platform only. We are not a party to, and do not participate in, any financial transaction, sale, rental agreement, or payment between users. We do not verify title, condition, or legal status of any property. Always perform independent due diligence and consult a qualified professional before completing a transaction.

sections.heading: 8. Dispute resolution
body: Disputes between users regarding a listed property are the sole responsibility of the parties involved. If you have a dispute with RE Platform itself, please contact us first — most issues can be resolved directly through our support team.

sections.heading: 9. Governing law
body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Armenia. Where the Service is offered in other countries, local mandatory consumer-protection law may also apply and will take precedence where these Terms conflict with it.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to these terms
body: We may revise these Terms as the Service evolves. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. See also our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.

privacy.metaDescription: How RE Platform collects, uses and protects your personal data, and what rights you have over it.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data RE Platform collects, why, and the choices you have.

sections.heading: 1. What data we collect
body: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, phone, listing details) and information collected automatically (device, browser, pages visited, approximate location) when you use the Service.

sections.heading: 2. How we use it
body: We use your data to operate the marketplace: to show and rank listings, enable messaging between users, send transactional notifications, prevent fraud, and improve the Service.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies
body: We use necessary cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences, and — with your consent — analytics and marketing cookies. See our Cookie Policy for full details and how to manage your choices.

sections.heading: 4. Third parties
body: We share data with service providers who help us run the Service: Supabase (database & authentication hosting), Mapbox (maps), and, where consented, analytics providers. These providers only receive the data necessary to perform their function and are bound by data-processing agreements.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention
body: We keep account data for as long as your account is active, and listing data for as long as required for legal and accounting purposes after a listing closes. You can request earlier deletion (see “Your rights” below).

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data, and to object to or restrict certain processing. You can exercise most of these rights directly from Settings, or by contacting us.

sections.heading: 7. Data security
body: We use industry-standard safeguards — encryption in transit, access controls, and row-level security on our database — to protect your data. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, but we work to minimize risk.

sections.heading: 8. Children's privacy
body: The Service is not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from them. If you believe a child has provided us data, please contact us and we will delete it.

sections.heading: 9. Contact for data protection
body: For any privacy question or to exercise your rights, contact our data protection team at privacy@re-platform.am or through our Contact page.

cookies.metaDescription: Which cookies RE Platform uses, why, and how to manage your preferences.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how RE Platform uses cookies and similar technologies, and how you can control them.

sections.heading: 1. What cookies are
body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that let a website remember information about your visit, such as your language preference or whether you're signed in.

sections.heading: 2. Types of cookies we use
body: Necessary cookies keep the Service working (sessions, security, load balancing) and cannot be disabled. Analytical cookies help us understand how the Service is used, in aggregate. Marketing cookies help us and our partners measure and personalize ads. Analytical and marketing cookies are only set with your consent.

sections.heading: 3. Third-party cookies
body: Some cookies are set by third parties that provide services on our behalf, such as analytics or maps providers. We only enable these after you consent to the relevant category.

sections.heading: 4. How to manage or disable cookies
body: You can change your consent at any time using the “Manage preferences” button below, or through your browser settings, which let you block or delete cookies. Blocking necessary cookies may break parts of the Service (e.g. staying signed in).

rows.purpose: Understand usage patterns to improve the Service (aggregated, anonymized where possible)
